contexts.context: ...from the contemplation of his injuries, morose, <mark>unrelenting</mark>, and tyrannical. How far it was possible...
...proceeds to deeper and darker wickedness; when his <mark>unrelenting</mark> cruelty meditates, and actually perpetrates, the last...
